本文没有空间，没有异能，仅凭智慧！

穿越到一穷二白的阴山县，玉九儿女扮男装参加科举。

运气不好惹了不该惹的人，一夜缱绻后逃之夭夭。

凭借在京城搜刮回来的钱财大搞基建。

发现怀有身孕还要忙着种田。

去失地抢回奴隶收为己用；发配边疆的犯人也通通落入她的手心。

她将无耻本性发挥到极致。

抢人、抢钱、抢地盘， 带领全县人民奔小康，将苦寒之地变成世外桃源。

靖王被贬阴山县，她这个女扮男装的县令热情接待，顺便薅他羊毛！

谁叫他是县里最有钱的呢？

即便不知道孩子的存在，也不妨碍他给孩子付奶粉钱吧？

她还要勾引靖王带她去西域偷药、搞游击战，抢东西。

一不小心，她将靖王这颗正经矜贵的正苗儿给彻底掰歪。

端妃娘娘以为儿子有断袖之弊，千里迢迢赶来吊打姘头。

而靖王自从被这个县令一茬接一茬的惊喜惊艳后，只想对她无底线纵容：她杀人，他想递刀；她放火，他想陪伴。

高冷正经的靖王碰上胆大妄为、不拘礼法的无耻女县令，火花四射，搞笑连连。

当靖王登上皇位才惊觉，他的女人早已收服四海列国，震惊天下？？

且看玉九儿如何做到上得了战场，出得了朝堂？如何逆天改命轰动朝野？

如何靠智慧扶摇而上，走上人生巅峰？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4eabc5d08bbda90cb93242ab16bc048e","author":"甘甜一一","author_id":"","book_id":"7323218405635411006","book_name":"让你穿越搞基建你颠覆世俗建个国","book_short_name":"玉谋权惊天下","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8a890","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8132人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":28,"name":"萌宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=28&name=萌宝&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":388,"name":"女扮男装","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=388&name=女扮男装&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7323218499654910526","read_count":"8132","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1574667"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"651","tags":"种田,古代言情,萌宝,穿越,甜宠,女扮男装,今穿古,搞笑轻松,基建,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/64814e674301ea1d14e97b798b48ba0a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440379&x-signature=aZ%2FoPnZbsWb2%2B39lItJeH5Oaz%2F4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1450976508654072","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"58"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323165938A65A3F9F19009FCB2B54"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":45,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16503,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18132,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":39675},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1712835197,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7356994617109414681","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，和别的女扮男装参加科举文不太一样，这个不怎么描写科举，挺放松的一个文，就是发现的太早了，章节太少了，不够看，大大加油写[学会了][学会了][学会了][学会了]","text_exts":[{"e":12,"s":8,"text":"女扮男装","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%B3%E6%89%AE%E7%94%B7%E8%A3%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742563789FCB2B54%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227356994617109414681%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227323218405635411006%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%B3%E6%89%AE%E7%94%B7%E8%A3%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712935091,"group_id":"7323218405635411006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3l3X3sBWeTvmQRLIdaqBphTcIYd8ZtLj2eoCsS7t1s5","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a1496674332f4cef9aca0bf7d9469cd6~tplv-s85hriknm
